# Rebase 8f7e6d5 onto 1029384; realistic long todo with verification hooks.
# Lines beginning with # are instructions or review notes from the editor.
#
# Commands:
# p, pick = use commit; r, reword = use commit, but edit the commit message
# e, edit = use commit, but stop for amending; s, squash = combine commits
# f, fixup = combine while discarding this message; d, drop = remove commit
# x, exec = run a shell command; b, break = stop here and continue later

pick 0000001 initialize workspace metadata
p 0000002 add license and security policy
pick 0000003 configure continuous integration
reword 0000004 explain supported upgrade path
r 0000005 clarify contributor workflow
edit 0000006 split storage abstraction
e 0000007 verify migration boundary
squash 0000008 fold storage review fixes
s 0000009 fold formatting follow-up
fixup 000000a remove temporary tracing
f 000000b correct import order
exec cargo fmt --all -- --check
x cargo test -q -p mark-syntax

# Parser and tokenizer series.
pick 0000010 add incremental line tokenizer
p 0000011 retain checkpoint state across blank lines
reword 0000012 describe zero-width match handling
r 0000013 document UTF-8 byte offsets
edit 0000014 separate regex routing changes
e 0000015 inspect fallback budget behavior
squash 0000016 combine tokenizer benchmark setup
s 0000017 combine benchmark naming cleanup
fixup 0000018 repair clippy warning
f 0000019 remove stale TODO
exec test -f crates/mark-syntax/Cargo.toml && cargo test -p mark-syntax
x printf 'tokenizer: %s\n' "${CI:-local}"

# Documentation subjects intentionally contain non-ASCII text.
pick 0000020 add résumé example for naïve input
p 0000021 document café paths in Zürich
reword 0000022 explain 東京 deployment notes
r 0000023 preserve Ελληνικά identifiers in output
edit 0000024 verify العربية right-to-left sample
e 0000025 inspect हिन्दी combining marks
squash 0000026 merge 한국어 snapshot updates
s 0000027 merge Español punctuation cleanup
fixup 0000028 normalize decomposed café example
f 0000029 retain astral rocket 🚀 in changelog
exec printf '%s\n' 'Unicode smoke: 東京 — مرحبًا — 🚀'
x value='👩‍💻'; test -n "$value" && printf '%s\n' "$value"

# Pause after the Unicode-sensitive changes for an interactive check.
break
b

# Configuration series.
pick 0000030 add default pager configuration
p 0000031 expose color policy setting
reword 0000032 rename ambiguous cache option
r 0000033 describe precedence rules
edit 0000034 split environment parsing
e 0000035 validate empty environment values
squash 0000036 fold configuration test matrix
s 0000037 fold comments from review
fixup 0000038 quote sample paths correctly
f 0000039 delete obsolete feature flag
exec env LC_ALL=C cargo test -q config::tests
x mode=${MODE:-debug}; printf 'mode=%s\n' "$mode"

# CLI series with shell pipelines and redirections.
pick 0000040 add stdin auto-detection
p 0000041 support explicit language selection
reword 0000042 improve terminal error message
r 0000043 explain broken-pipe behavior
edit 0000044 separate pager initialization
e 0000045 inspect terminal restoration
squash 0000046 combine argument parser tests
s 0000047 combine help snapshot updates
fixup 0000048 remove unused mock
f 0000049 correct expected exit code
exec cargo test -q -p mark-cli 2>&1 | tee /tmp/mark-cli-tests.log
x grep -q 'test result: ok' /tmp/mark-cli-tests.log

# Theme and rendering series.
pick 0000050 add true-color capability probe
p 0000051 retain fallback ANSI palette
reword 0000052 describe contrast guarantees
r 0000053 clarify terminal width calculation
edit 0000054 split grapheme rendering patch
e 0000055 inspect wide glyph alignment
squash 0000056 merge renderer regression cases
s 0000057 merge snapshot update
fixup 0000058 fix trailing whitespace
f 0000059 remove debug color swatch
exec width=$(printf '界🚀' | wc -c); test "$width" -gt 2
x cargo test -q rendering::tests -- --nocapture

# Drop two superseded experiments rather than replaying them.
drop 0000060 prototype global mutable cache
d 0000061 benchmark obsolete scanner
pick 0000062 add bounded cache implementation
p 0000063 measure process-cold throughput
reword 0000064 state benchmark assumptions
r 0000065 explain fixture repetition factor
edit 0000066 tune checkpoint interval
e 0000067 verify allocation profile
squash 0000068 combine benchmark harness changes
s 0000069 combine report formatting
fixup 000006a use deterministic seed
f 000006b silence platform-specific warning

# Quoting, substitutions, conditionals, and loops exercise embedded shell.
exec sh -c 'set -eu; test "$(git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree)" = true'
x if test -n "${HOME:-}"; then printf 'home=%s\n' "$HOME"; fi
exec for crate in mark-cli mark-syntax; do cargo check -q -p "$crate" || exit; done
x msg="release candidate 🌍"; printf '%s\n' "$msg" > /tmp/rebase-message
exec test "$(cat /tmp/rebase-message)" = 'release candidate 🌍'
x rm -f /tmp/rebase-message /tmp/mark-cli-tests.log

# Packaging series.
pick 0000070 include grammar license inventory
p 0000071 sort generated asset manifest
reword 0000072 explain reproducible archive timestamps
r 0000073 document checksum verification
edit 0000074 split release workflow permissions
e 0000075 inspect prerelease artifact names
squash 0000076 combine package smoke tests
s 0000077 combine workflow formatting
fixup 0000078 pin temporary action revision
f 0000079 remove duplicate upload step
exec test -r assets/grammars/licenses.json
x git diff --check HEAD^

  # Leading whitespace is accepted on comments and commands by this grammar.
  pick 0000080 add indented todo regression
	p 0000081 retain tab-indented alias coverage
  reword 0000082 describe whitespace handling
	r 0000083 mention editor normalization
  exec printf '%s\n' 'indented command ✓'
	x test -d crates/mark-syntax
  break
	b

# Final cleanup series.
pick 0000090 update release notes for version 1.0
p 0000091 thank translators: Chloé, 李雷, and أمينة
reword 0000092 summarize compatibility guarantees
r 0000093 note emoji rendering fix 🧪
edit 0000094 review public API names
e 0000095 inspect final dependency graph
squash 0000096 fold release-note typo fixes
s 0000097 fold changelog link repair
fixup 0000098 normalize final snapshots
f 0000099 remove release checklist scratch file
drop 000009a discard superseded release draft
d 000009b discard accidental lockfile churn
exec cargo test --workspace --all-targets
x git diff --check 1029384..HEAD

# Stop once more before publishing, then finish the todo.
break
b
# End of stress interactive-rebase fixture; trailing newline is intentional.
